description: Look trendy and stay comfortable in these Gypsy II nubuck floaters from puma. This pair can be teamed with cargo shorts and tees for a cool casual look. Upper Velvet straps on the forefoot and around ankle with padded fabric lining for comfort and protection Elastic gussets holding together the midfoot and back foot strap to offer a customised Fit Velcro closures on the forefoot and ankle strap for snug comfort Cushioned foam footbed with a nubuck lining for all-day comfort Outsole TPR outsole with multi-directional lugs for superior grip Ergonomically curved at the midfoot for inner arch support shoe care Wipe surface with a soft, damp cloth and a nubuck brush to remove dust Do not wash or store in direct sunlight
